race.description: Donald & District Community Bank Mdn Plate
race.comment: PHANTOM'S CHASE (5) has raced over the mile at all three runs this prep. Hit the front close to home last start at Echuca only to be run down near the line. Beaten narrowly over a similar trip to this at Seymour last prep. Cherry ripe at the fourth run back and is ready to break through. CONVAAYA (3) stepped up quickly to 2040m at Seymour last start and weakened late in the piece after leading. Fitter now and is a likely improver.  FRESHWATER FOX (11) kept coming at the end over 1600m at Hamilton last time. Has only been to the races three times and is raising the bar at each appearance. This looks a suitable assignment. SITAR (6) was 37 days between runs when down the track at Mildura last time out. Fitter for three runs back from a spell and can improve sharply. BAROSSA VALLEY (1) was too bad to be true last start after a real eye-catcher at Kilmore over the mile two back. Worth another chance.
